name: 1. PrintHub - Order Confirmation (Email + WA + SMS + Tracking)

parameters.name: html
parameters.value:
=

Hi {{$json.customerName}}, your order {{$json.orderNumber}} (KES {{$json.total}}) is confirmed! We will notify you when it's dispatched.

parameters.name: html
parameters.value:
=

Exciting news {{$json.customerName}}! Your order is dispatched. Tracking: {{$json.trackingNumber}}

parameters.name: html
parameters.value:
=

Hi {{$json.customerName}},

We have received your request. Attached is a summary draft.

parameters.bodyParametersJson:
={ "from": "PrintHub Africa ", "to": "{{ $json.customerEmail }}", "subject": "{{ $json.reminderNumber === 1 ? 'You left something behind! 🛒' : $json.reminderNumber === 2 ? 'Your 10% discount is waiting ⏰' : 'Last chance — your cart expires tonight 🔥' }}", "html": "

Hi {{ $json.customerName.split(' ')[0] }}!

Your cart and discount expire soon.' }}

    {{ $json.items.map(i => '

' Use code ' + $node['Generate 10% Coupon'].json.code + ' for 10% off!' : '' }} Complete your order: {{ $json.cartUrl }}" } }

={ "from": "PrintHub Stock <stock@printhub.africa>", "to": "{{ $env.ADMIN_EMAIL }}", "subject": "{{ $node['Fetch Stock Alert Template'].json.subject }}", "html": "{{ ($node['Fetch Stock Alert Template'].json.bodyHtml || '').replace(/{{productName}}/g, $json.productName).replace(/{{sku}}/g, $json.sku || 'N/A').replace(/{{productId}}/g, $json.productId) }}" }
={ "allow_upsert": true, "requests": {{ JSON.stringify($json.metaBatch.slice(0, 50).map(p => ({ method: 'UPDATE', retailer_id: p.retailer_id, data: p }))) }} }

={ "products": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Format for Platforms'].json.products.slice(0,50).map(p => ({ item_content_id: p.id, title: p.name, description: p.shortDescription || p.name, price: p.basePriceKes, currency: 'KES', availability: p.availability === 'IN_STOCK' ? 'in stock' : 'out of stock', link: 'https://printhub.africa/shop/' + p.slug }))) }} }

={ "from": "PrintHub AI ", "to": "{{ $env.ADMIN_EMAIL }}", "subject": "✅ Social Feed Sync Complete — {{ $node['Format for Platforms'].json.count }} products", "html": "

✅ Catalog Sync Complete

Successfully synced {{ $node['Format for Platforms'].json.count }} products to:

  • Meta Commerce Catalog
  • TikTok Shop Catalog

{{ new Date().toLocaleString('en-GB', {timeZone:'Africa/Nairobi'}) }} EAT

" }

={ "from": "PrintHub Africa <quotes@printhub.africa>", "to": "{{ $node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.customerEmail }}", "subject": "{{ $node['Fetch Email Template'].json.subject }}", "html": "{{ ($node['Fetch Email Template'].json.bodyHtml || '').replace(/{{customerName}}/g, $node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.customerName).replace(/{{projectName}}/g, $node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.projectName).replace(/{{quoteTotal}}/g, (($node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.amount || 0) * 1.16).toLocaleString()).replace(/{{pdfUrl}}/g, $node['Generate Quote PDF'].json.pdfUrl || '') }}" }

={ "messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.customerPhone }}", "type": "text", "text": { "body": "{{ ($node['Fetch WhatsApp Template'].json.bodyText || '').replace(/{{customerName}}/g, $node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.customerName).replace(/{{projectName}}/g, $node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.projectName).replace(/{{quoteTotal}}/g, (($node['Get Full Quote Details'].json.amount || 0) * 1.16).toLocaleString()) }}" } }

={ "from": "PrintHub Security ", "to": ["{{ $env.ADMIN_EMAIL }}", "{{ $json.userEmail }}"], "subject": "🔑 New Device Login — {{ $json.userEmail }}", "html": "

🔑 New Device Login Detected

A new device logged into the PrintHub admin panel.

User{{ $json.userEmail }}
IP Address{{ $json.ipAddress }}
Location{{ $json.geolocation || 'Unknown' }}
Device{{ ($json.userAgent || '').slice(0, 80) }}
Time{{ new Date().toLocaleString('en-GB', {timeZone:'Africa/Nairobi'}) }} EAT

If this was not you, revoke all sessions immediately →

PrintHub Africa Admin Security System

" }

={ "type": "NEW_DEVICE_LOGIN", "message": "New device login for {{ $json.userEmail }} from {{ $json.ipAddress }} ({{ $json.geolocation || 'Unknown location' }})", "severity": "INFO", "metadata": {{ JSON.stringify({ userId: $json.userId, ip: $json.ipAddress, location: $json.geolocation, device: $json.userAgent }) }} }

={ "model": "gpt-4o", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You write Reddit posts for PrintHub Africa..." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Write a Reddit post about {{ $json.productName }} for r/Kenya. Return JSON { title, body }." }] }
={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 2000, "system": "You are writing a LinkedIn Newsletter...", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Write newsletter for {{ $json.productName }}." }] }

={ "title": "{{ JSON.parse($node['Claude: LinkedIn Article'].json.content[0].text).headline }}", "contentFormat": "html", "content": "{{ JSON.parse($node['Claude: LinkedIn Article'].json.content[0].text).body_html }}", "publishStatus": "public", "canonicalUrl": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{$json.productSlug}}" }
={ "model": "llama-3.1-sonar-large-128k-online", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Kenya trends this week for print shop hooks." }] }

={ "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "Write 3 SMS marketing messages for PrintHub Africa..." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Featured: {{ JSON.stringify($node['Get Featured Products'].json) }}. Context: {{ $node['Perplexity: Trends'].json.choices[0].message.content }}" }] }
={ "model": "llama-3.1-sonar-large-128k-online", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "SEO opportunities for print shop in Nairobi." }] }

={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "system": "Write SEO article for PrintHub Africa...", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "{{ $node['Perplexity: SEO Research'].json.choices[0].message.content }}" }] }
